TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ciwlokay == 1. 'Orip ni Zwingli, likisi ato pakayraan: 2. Kalfin 3.Kawasan nisafaloco'an: Sakowan no Fangcalay cudad: Pakaynien no Kawas i Fangcalay cudad ko pipa'araw to tamdaw. Mipadama ko Fangcalasy cudad titaanan misapinang minengneng to so'elinay a demak. Mihawikid to 'icel no Fangcalay 'Adingo mifalic to faloco' no tamdaw, saka fana' no tamdaw to so'elinay, ta midoedo to sowal Ningra. O polong no rikec i Fangcalay cudad, paratoh no pa'ayaway to sowal no Kawas ato salaloma'an no ratoh saheto pa'esesay to pipa'araw to Tapang ci Yis Kristoan, pakaynien no Kawas i nafaloco'an ningra, masetek ko malatamdaway a sowal, mapakadofah ko sida'it, ciso'elinay, maro' i 'orip no tamdamdaw, pakayni i Cingraan masongila' ko kahapinang. Matiniay ko pitelek no Kawas, dengan o pipakayni no tamdaw i ci Yisan, awaay to pakayraan a mafana' to Kawas. O patelocan no Fangcalay cudad ato paterongan ci Kristo, orasaka, pakayni i Fangcalay cudad, mafana' kita ci Kristoan. Patonekan no sowal: I 16 sici itini i Holan itiyaay a Arminian adihay ko fangafang i laloma' no kiwkay, caay pilayap cangra to ni Kafin a sini'ada ko kaci'orip sanay a kawasan sowal, o paratatenga nangra caay ka i kaci'orip no tamdaw a ira ko sakowan. Paini ko Arminian: a. Manengneng no kawas iraay a mimaan ko paso'elinay faloco' no tamdaw to mapili'. b. Talacowa dengan o pipaso'elin no Tamdaw to mapaka'orip, nika mali'ayaw to ni Kristo mapatay ko tamdaw. c. O katatiih no tamdaw, ano caay ka I'ayaw ko pafeli no Kawas to sini'ada to ira ko paso'elin, o caay ka nga'ay no tamdaw ci nga'ayay ko demak. d. So'elinay miliyaw ma'orip a tamdaw caay ka i nipipaso'elinan ko sakadipot. O sapisalofaw to fangafang, laocan no kitakit no Holan i 1618 miheca malisaot masa'opo ko polong no kitakit lomaoc, mitahidang to kasakitakit no nifalican pakaraan kiwkay a dayhiw mikihatiya; itiya ira ko 35 no itiniay niyaro' a foksi, papinaay a ciwlo, 5 kawasan hakasi, 18 komong no kitakit, ato 27 romaay kitakit a dayhiw mikihatiya, halo Scotland, England, Belgium, Switzerland, France. O Arminian mamalalen ko kaaini no ngangan mikihatiya to kalomaoc nasa, caay ka harateng o mapakokotay cangra, mipatado ko niyah to sapidama. O lomaocan o midamaay to ni Kafin a to'as no pitooran, mitefoc to moraraway 5 a nipasadakan no Arminian, malaheci ko ni Dort a paso'elinan (Creed of Dort), mitelek to ni Kafin 5 a sifana', oni patonekan no sowal ni Kafin ko saka lahecian tonini: no Inkiris a limaay a tilid to "TULIP" pahapinang to limaay a kasasiroma ni Kafin a pakiraan. a. O ciraraway ko tamdaw . b. Awaay ko parafas to pipili' . c. Patelek ko pihepol ni Kristo . d. Ciepoc ko pitahidang no Fangcalay 'Adingo . e. makadipot ko Tarokos (mi'emetay) . Tolo a malacecay: Ifiso 4:5 nai Wama ato Wawa masadak nai Wama a masadak ko Wawa, nai Wama ato Wawa masadak ko Fangcalay 'Adingo (1 Pitilo 1:11). Ato sowal no Wawa masadak i 589 miheca i Toledo a kakeridan sa'opo. I saka 9 sici kalaliyangan no kawali kaetip kiwkay. I 1014 miheca Roma Tinsokiw pakayni i Nisiya paso'elin a rayray, nika Tongcenciaw caay pilayap. I 1960 miheca mikapot to kapolongan no hekal kiwkay yofayof ko Tongcenciaw, mala o kasasowalen. Fa'elohay kiwkay (Sinciaw) talacowa ira ko pilikaf to kawasan nengneng no Tinsokiw i, nika pakayni to nengneng i Fangcalay 'Adingo, midotocay to no to'as no kaetipay kiwkay. Laloma'ay no kiwkay a sakolicay tosaay, oya paino' ato mihiseiki. Saki mihiseiki a todong, ira ko ni Kafin a katadamaan. Caay ka pihayda cingra to ni Zwingli to saki mihiseiki a o salongan. O mihiseiki a 'epan ato epah talacowa caay ka so'elin ko kafalic, nika oya 'epan ato epah o mala no Fangcalay a pahecian to, o pakaen no Kawas to salo'afang no tamdaw, orasaka, 'epan ato epah o mihakelongay ko 'icel no Fangcalay 'Adingo, milayap i, so'elinay ko pilayap to no Fangacalay no salo'afang a sakalemed. Saki Paino', malecad caay ko salongan aca. Tona mapaino' ko tamdaw i, pakayni ko tamdaw to nai Kawasay milayap to pa'araw no Kawas a sini'ada, mitelek i Kawas itiya, o Kawas ato tamdaw matatelekay to. Roma a sowal, o katatelek no tamdaw ato Kawas ko pipaino', o tadamaanay a kalemedan. Nika oya nitelekan, sakitodong aca toya so'elinay nipili'an a tamdaw ko saka cirocek, oya caay ko kapili' i, matatelek to, awaay ko depoc. Sakapot no kiwkay: o pikowan to kiwkay o papakayni i Fangcalay Cudad, caay ka pakayni i to'ek, liyok no ka'oripan ko pisetek, I laloma no Fangcalay Cudad, lekapot no kiwkay oya kasarecok no sini'ada, i laloma'ay no kiwkay a foksi, ciwlo, singsi, sicuci, kasarocek no tayal, awaay ko kasasa'eran. 4. Kaitiraan no kiwkay: Switzerland, Netherlands, Eastern Europe, Scotland (UK), Canada, United States, Asia, Africa, Oceania, ato roma kitakit. 5. Pahecian: O kacitodong no dayhiw no aniniay nikapolongan sician o kadadokadokaan. Tinako to ni Li Tenghuy congtong.
S.PHON: == ¶iw…ĺo~ukaj == *. °o~urip ni *wiŇč…ĺi, …ĺikisi ato~u pakajraan: *. ka…ĺfin *.kawasan nisafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an: sako~uwan no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ: pakajni…ôn no~u kawas i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ ko~u pipa °araw to~u tam…¨~…ģaw. mipa…¨~…ģama ko~u faŇč ¶a…ĺasj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ titaanan misapinaŇč min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. mińßawiki…¨~…ģ to~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj °a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, saka fana ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj, ta mi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u so~uwa…ĺ niŇčra. o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u rik…ô ¶ i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ, parato~uńß no~u pa °ajawaj to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u kawas ato~u sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u rato~uńß sańß…ôto~u pa °…ôs…ôsaj to~u pipa °araw to~u tapaŇč ¶i jis kristo~uan, pakajni…ôn no~u kawas i nafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an niŇčra, mas…ôt…ôk ko~u ma…ĺatam…¨~…ģawaj a so~uwa…ĺ, mapaka…¨~…ģo~ufańß ko~u si…¨~…ģa °it, ¶iso~u °…ô…ĺinaj, maro~u ° i °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw, pakajni i ¶iŇčraan maso~uŇči…ĺa ° ko~u kańßapinaŇč. matiniaj ko~u pit…ô…ĺ…ôk no~u kawas, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u pipakajni no~u tam…¨~…ģaw i ¶i jisan, awaaj to~u pakajraan a mafana ° to~u kawas. o~u pat…ô…ĺo~u ¶an no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ ato~u pat…ôro~uŇčan ¶i kristo~u, o~urasaka, pakajni i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ, mafana ° kita ¶i kristo~uan. pato~un…ôkan no~u so~uwa…ĺ: i ** si ¶i itini i ńßo~u…ĺan itijaaj a arminian a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u faŇčafaŇč i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u kiwkaj, ¶aaj pi…ĺajap ¶aŇčra to~u ni kafin a sini °a…¨~…ģa ko~u ka ¶i °o~urip sanaj a kawasan so~uwa…ĺ, o~u paratat…ôŇča naŇčra ¶aaj ka i ka ¶i °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ira ko~u sako~uwan. paini ko~u arminian: a. man…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u kawas iraaj a mimaan ko~u paso~u °…ô…ĺinaj fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u mapi…ĺi °. b~b~v. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u pipaso~u °…ô…ĺin no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u mapaka °o~urip, nika ma…ĺi °ajaw to~u ni kristo~u mapataj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. ¶. o~u katatiińß no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ano~u ¶aaj ka i °ajaw ko~u paf…ô…ĺi no~u kawas to~u sini °a…¨~…ģa to~u ira ko~u paso~u °…ô…ĺin, o~u ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ¶i Ňča °ajaj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak. …¨~…ģ. so~u °…ô…ĺinaj mi…ĺijaw ma °o~urip a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶aaj ka i nipipaso~u °…ô…ĺinan ko~u saka…¨~…ģipo~ut. o~u sapisa…ĺo~ufaw to~u faŇčafaŇč, …ĺao~u ¶an no~u kitakit no~u ńßo~u…ĺan i **** mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺisao~ut masa °o~upo~u ko~u ¶iw…ĺo~u, * kawasan ńßakasi, ** ko~umo~uŇč no~u kitakit, ato~u ** ro~umaaj kitakit a …¨~…ģajńßiw mikińßatija, ńßa…ĺo~u s ¶o~ut…ĺan…¨~…ģ, …ôŇč…ĺan…¨~…ģ, b~b~v…ô…ĺ*io~u~um, swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ, fran ¶…ô. o~u arminian mama…ĺa…ĺ…ôn ko~u kaaini no~u ŇčaŇčan mikińßatija to~u ka…ĺo~umao~u ¶ nasa, ¶aaj ka ńßarat…ôŇč o~u mapako~uko~utaj ¶aŇčra, mipata…¨~…ģo~u ko~u nijańß to~u sapi…¨~…ģama. o~u …ĺo~umao~u ¶an o~u mi…¨~…ģamaaj to~u ni kafin a to~u °as no~u pito~uo~uran, mit…ôfo~u ¶ to~u mo~urarawaj * a nipasa…¨~…ģakan no~u arminian, ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i ko~u ni …¨~…ģo~urt a paso~u °…ô…ĺinan ( ¶r…ô…ô…¨~…ģ o~uf …¨~…ģo~urt), mit…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u ni kafin * a sifana °, o~uni pato~un…ôkan no~u so~uwa…ĺ ni kafin ko~u saka …ĺańß…ô ¶ian to~unini: no~u inkiris a …ĺimaaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u "to~u~u…ĺip" pańßapinaŇč to~u …ĺimaaj a kasasiro~uma ni kafin a pakiraan. a. o~u ¶irarawaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw . b~b~v. awaaj ko~u parafas to~u pipi…ĺi ° . ¶. pat…ô…ĺ…ôk ko~u pińß…ôpo~u…ĺ ni kristo~u . …¨~…ģ. ¶i…ôpo~u ¶ ko~u pitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj °a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u . …ô. maka…¨~…ģipo~ut ko~u taro~uko~us (mi °…ôm…ôtaj) . to~u…ĺo~u a ma…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj: ifiso~u *:* nai wama ato~u wawa masa…¨~…ģak nai wama a masa…¨~…ģak ko~u wawa, nai wama ato~u wawa masa…¨~…ģak ko~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj °a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u (* piti…ĺo~u *:**). ato~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u wawa masa…¨~…ģak i *** mińß…ô ¶a i to~u…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģo~u a kak…ôri…¨~…ģan sa °o~upo~u. i saka * si ¶i ka…ĺa…ĺijaŇčan no~u kawa…ĺi ka…ôtip kiwkaj. i **** mińß…ô ¶a ro~uma tinso~ukiw pakajni i nisija paso~u °…ô…ĺin a rajraj, nika to~uŇč ¶…ôn ¶iaw ¶aaj pi…ĺajap. i **** mińß…ô ¶a mikapo~ut to~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ kiwkaj jo~ufajo~uf ko~u to~uŇč ¶…ôn ¶iaw, ma…ĺa o~u kasaso~uwa…ĺ…ôn. fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj kiwkaj (sin ¶iaw) ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ira ko~u pi…ĺikaf to~u kawasan n…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u tinso~ukiw i, nika pakajni to~u n…ôŇčn…ôŇč i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj °a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u, mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶aj to~u no~u to~u °as no~u ka…ôtipaj kiwkaj. …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u kiwkaj a sako~u…ĺi ¶aj to~usaaj, o~uja paino~u ° ato~u mińßis…ôiki. saki mińßis…ôiki a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč, ira ko~u ni kafin a kata…¨~…ģamaan. ¶aaj ka pińßaj…¨~…ģa ¶iŇčra to~u ni *wiŇč…ĺi to~u saki mińßis…ôiki a o~u sa…ĺo~uŇčan. o~u mińßis…ôiki a °…ôpan ato~u …ôpańß ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj ka so~u °…ô…ĺin ko~u kafa…ĺi ¶, nika o~uja °…ôpan ato~u …ôpańß o~u ma…ĺa no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a pańß…ô ¶ian to~u, o~u paka…ôn no~u kawas to~u sa…ĺo~u °afaŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~urasaka, °…ôpan ato~u …ôpańß o~u mińßak…ô…ĺo~uŇčaj ko~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj °a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u, mi…ĺajap i, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj ko~u pi…ĺajap to~u no~u faŇča ¶a…ĺaj no~u sa…ĺo~u °afaŇč a saka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ. saki paino~u °, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ¶aaj ko~u sa…ĺo~uŇčan a ¶a. to~una mapaino~u ° ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw i, pakajni ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u nai kawasaj mi…ĺajap to~u pa °araw no~u kawas a sini °a…¨~…ģa, mit…ô…ĺ…ôk i kawas itija, o~u kawas ato~u tam…¨~…ģaw matat…ô…ĺ…ôkaj to~u. ro~uma a so~uwa…ĺ, o~u katat…ô…ĺ…ôk no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u kawas ko~u pipaino~u °, o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a ka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģan. nika o~uja nit…ô…ĺ…ôkan, sakito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a ¶a to~uja so~u °…ô…ĺinaj nipi…ĺi °an a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u saka ¶iro~u ¶…ôk, o~uja ¶aaj ko~u kapi…ĺi ° i, matat…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u, awaaj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ôpo~u ¶. sakapo~ut no~u kiwkaj: o~u piko~uwan to~u kiwkaj o~u papakajni i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ, ¶aaj ka pakajni i to~u °…ôk, …ĺijo~uk no~u ka °o~uripan ko~u pis…ôt…ôk, i …ĺa…ĺo~uma no~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ, …ĺ…ôkapo~ut no~u kiwkaj o~uja kasar…ô ¶o~uk no~u sini °a…¨~…ģa, i …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u kiwkaj a fo~uksi, ¶iw…ĺo~u, siŇčsi, si ¶o~u~u ¶i, kasaro~u ¶…ôk no~u taja…ĺ, awaaj ko~u kasasa °…ôran. *. kaitiraan no~u kiwkaj: swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ, n…ôtńß…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģs, …ôast…ôrn …ôo~u~uro~up…ô, s ¶o~ut…ĺan…¨~…ģ (o~u~uk), ¶ana…¨~…ģa, o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ stat…ôs, asia, afri ¶a, o~u ¶…ôania, ato~u ro~uma kitakit. *. pańß…ô ¶ian: o~u ka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u …¨~…ģajńßiw no~u aniniaj nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan si ¶ian o~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~uka…¨~…ģo~ukaan. tinako~u to~u ni …ĺi t…ôŇčńßo~u~uj ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč.
S.FORM: == Ciwlokay == 1. 'Orip ni Zwingli, likisi ato pakayraan: 2. Kalfin 3.Kawasan nisafaloco'an: Sakowan no Fangcalay cudad: Pakaynien no Kawas i Fangcalay cudad ko pipa'araw to tamdaw. Mipadama ko Fangcalasy cudad titaanan misapinang minengneng to so'elinay a demak. Mihawikid to 'icel no Fangcalay 'Adingo mifalic to faloco' no tamdaw, saka fana' no tamdaw to so'elinay, ta midoedo to sowal Ningra. O polong no rikec i Fangcalay cudad, paratoh no pa'ayaway to sowal no Kawas ato salaloma'an no ratoh saheto pa'esesay to pipa'araw to Tapang ci Yis Kristoan, pakaynien no Kawas i nafaloco'an ningra, masetek ko malatamdaway a sowal, mapakadofah ko sida'it, ciso'elinay, maro' i 'orip no tamdamdaw, pakayni i Cingraan masongila' ko kahapinang. Matiniay ko pitelek no Kawas, dengan o pipakayni no tamdaw i ci Yisan, awaay to pakayraan a mafana' to Kawas. O patelocan no Fangcalay cudad ato paterongan ci Kristo, orasaka, pakayni i Fangcalay cudad, mafana' kita ci Kristoan. Patonekan no sowal: I 16 sici itini i Holan itiyaay a Arminian adihay ko fangafang i laloma' no kiwkay, caay pilayap cangra to ni Kafin a sini'ada ko kaci'orip sanay a kawasan sowal, o paratatenga nangra caay ka i kaci'orip no tamdaw a ira ko sakowan. Paini ko Arminian: a. Manengneng no kawas iraay a mimaan ko paso'elinay faloco' no tamdaw to mapili'. b. Talacowa dengan o pipaso'elin no Tamdaw to mapaka'orip, nika mali'ayaw to ni Kristo mapatay ko tamdaw. c. O katatiih no tamdaw, ano caay ka I'ayaw ko pafeli no Kawas to sini'ada to ira ko paso'elin, o caay ka nga'ay no tamdaw ci nga'ayay ko demak. d. So'elinay miliyaw ma'orip a tamdaw caay ka i nipipaso'elinan ko sakadipot. O sapisalofaw to fangafang, laocan no kitakit no Holan i 1618 miheca malisaot masa'opo ko polong no kitakit lomaoc, mitahidang to kasakitakit no nifalican pakaraan kiwkay a dayhiw mikihatiya; itiya ira ko 35 no itiniay niyaro' a foksi, papinaay a ciwlo, 5 kawasan hakasi, 18 komong no kitakit, ato 27 romaay kitakit a dayhiw mikihatiya, halo Scotland, England, Belgium, Switzerland, France. O Arminian mamalalen ko kaaini no ngangan mikihatiya to kalomaoc nasa, caay ka harateng o mapakokotay cangra, mipatado ko niyah to sapidama. O lomaocan o midamaay to ni Kafin a to'as no pitooran, mitefoc to moraraway 5 a nipasadakan no Arminian, malaheci ko ni Dort a paso'elinan (Creed of Dort), mitelek to ni Kafin 5 a sifana', oni patonekan no sowal ni Kafin ko saka lahecian tonini: no Inkiris a limaay a tilid to "TULIP" pahapinang to limaay a kasasiroma ni Kafin a pakiraan. a. O ciraraway ko tamdaw . b. Awaay ko parafas to pipili' . c. Patelek ko pihepol ni Kristo . d. Ciepoc ko pitahidang no Fangcalay 'Adingo . e. makadipot ko Tarokos (mi'emetay) . Tolo a malacecay: Ifiso 4:5 nai Wama ato Wawa masadak nai Wama a masadak ko Wawa, nai Wama ato Wawa masadak ko Fangcalay 'Adingo (1 Pitilo 1:11). Ato sowal no Wawa masadak i 589 miheca i Toledo a kakeridan sa'opo. I saka 9 sici kalaliyangan no kawali kaetip kiwkay. I 1014 miheca Roma Tinsokiw pakayni i Nisiya paso'elin a rayray, nika Tongcenciaw caay pilayap. I 1960 miheca mikapot to kapolongan no hekal kiwkay yofayof ko Tongcenciaw, mala o kasasowalen. Fa'elohay kiwkay (Sinciaw) talacowa ira ko pilikaf to kawasan nengneng no Tinsokiw i, nika pakayni to nengneng i Fangcalay 'Adingo, midotocay to no to'as no kaetipay kiwkay. Laloma'ay no kiwkay a sakolicay tosaay, oya paino' ato mihiseiki. Saki mihiseiki a todong, ira ko ni Kafin a katadamaan. Caay ka pihayda cingra to ni Zwingli to saki mihiseiki a o salongan. O mihiseiki a 'epan ato epah talacowa caay ka so'elin ko kafalic, nika oya 'epan ato epah o mala no Fangcalay a pahecian to, o pakaen no Kawas to salo'afang no tamdaw, orasaka, 'epan ato epah o mihakelongay ko 'icel no Fangcalay 'Adingo, milayap i, so'elinay ko pilayap to no Fangacalay no salo'afang a sakalemed. Saki Paino', malecad caay ko salongan aca. Tona mapaino' ko tamdaw i, pakayni ko tamdaw to nai Kawasay milayap to pa'araw no Kawas a sini'ada, mitelek i Kawas itiya, o Kawas ato tamdaw matatelekay to. Roma a sowal, o katatelek no tamdaw ato Kawas ko pipaino', o tadamaanay a kalemedan. Nika oya nitelekan, sakitodong aca toya so'elinay nipili'an a tamdaw ko saka cirocek, oya caay ko kapili' i, matatelek to, awaay ko depoc. Sakapot no kiwkay: o pikowan to kiwkay o papakayni i Fangcalay Cudad, caay ka pakayni i to'ek, liyok no ka'oripan ko pisetek, I laloma no Fangcalay Cudad, lekapot no kiwkay oya kasarecok no sini'ada, i laloma'ay no kiwkay a foksi, ciwlo, singsi, sicuci, kasarocek no tayal, awaay ko kasasa'eran. 4. Kaitiraan no kiwkay: Switzerland, Netherlands, Eastern Europe, Scotland (UK), Canada, United States, Asia, Africa, Oceania, ato roma kitakit. 5. Pahecian: O kacitodong no dayhiw no aniniay nikapolongan sician o kadadokadokaan. Tinako to ni Li Tenghuy congtong.
